sentence: O cielo no ye claro hue.
ipa: o θjelo no ʝe klaɾo we
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] and Ĕ>ie 'cielo' in the westernmost, Castilian-leaning Aragonese per nagore_lain2001; five-vowel system per hualde2005.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuaranta euros.
ipa: estos θapatos kwestan kwaɾanta ewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] distinción and Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' per nagore_lain2001; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per hualde2005.

sentence: O cheneral chunta a chent en a plaza.
ipa: o tʃeneɾal tʃunta a tʃent en a plaθa
gloss_en: The general gathers the people in the square.
notes: Latin J-/Ge,i- > velar [x] 'cheneral'... — Western Aragonese takes the Castilian [x] outcome rather than [tʃ]/[dʒ]; distinción per nagore_lain2001; five-vowel system per hualde2005.

sentence: Mi chirmán bibe cerca d'a plaza.
ipa: mi tʃiɾman biβe θeɾka ð a plaθa
gloss_en: My brother lives near the square.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cerca','plaza' per nagore_lain2001; intervocalic ⟨b⟩ approximant [β] 'bibe' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per hualde2005.

sentence: Ves de frente y tuerce en a primera carrera.
ipa: bes de fɾente ʝ tweɾθe en a pɾimeɾa kareɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: F- retained 'frente' and Ŏ>ue with distinción 'tuerce' per nagore_lain2001; five-vowel realisation per hualde2005.

sentence: A carne d'aquel puesto yera buena.
ipa: a kaɾne ð akel pwesto ʝeɾa bwena
gloss_en: The meat from that place was good.
notes: Ŏ>ue 'puesto','buena' and imperfect 'yera' per nagore_lain2001; clitic ⟨d'⟩ elision per hualde2005.

sentence: Án ye a clau d'o coche?
ipa: an ʝe a klaw ð o kotʃe
gloss_en: Where is the car key?
notes: Interrogative 'án' and 'clau' (key) per nagore_lain2001; ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'coche' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per hualde2005.

sentence: Cuántas presonas bienen a cenar?
ipa: kuantas pɾesonas bjenen a θenaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'bienen' and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cenar' per nagore_lain2001; count question per penny2002.

sentence: Si yo podese, mercaría aquella casa.
ipa: si ʝo poðese meɾkaɾia akeʎa kasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Castilian-type conditional -aría 'mercaría' alongside Aragonese 'mercar' (to buy) — the transitional profile per nagore_lain2001; imperfect subjunctive per penny2002.

sentence: Ahiere merqué cinco quilos de cereixas.
ipa: ajeɾe meɾke θinko kilos de θeɾejʃas
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cinco' and ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'cereixas' per nagore_lain2001; preterite 'merqué' per hualde2005.

sentence: L'añada que bien iré ta Zaragoza.
ipa: l aɲaða ke bjen iɾe ta θaɾaɣoθa
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Zaragoza.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'añada' and distinción ⟨z⟩/⟨c⟩ [θ] 'Zaragoza' per nagore_lain2001; directional 'ta' per hualde2005.

sentence: Truca-me cuando plegues ta casa.
ipa: tɾuka me kwando pleɡes ta kasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: 'trucar','plegar' [ˈpleɡes] per nagore_lain2001; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel per hualde2005.

sentence: Buenos días, cómo te ba?
ipa: bwenos dias komo te ba
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buenos' and Castilian-leaning 'días' (day) per nagore_lain2001; greeting register per penny2002.

sentence: Más bale paxaro en man que ciento bolando.
ipa: mas bale paʃaɾo en man ke θjento bolando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro' and distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] Ĕ>ie 'ciento' per nagore_lain2001; proverb per penny2002.

sentence: A muller biella pilla l'agulla amariella.
ipa: a muʎeɾ bjeʎa piʎa l aɡʎa amaɾjeʎa
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] preserved 'muller','biella','pilla','agulla' (the lateral resists yeísmo even in the west) and Ĕ>ie per nagore_lain2001; clitic ⟨l'⟩ per hualde2005.

sentence: O can corre por a ribera d'o río.
ipa: o kan kore poɾ a riβeɾa ð o rio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre', word-initial [r] 'río' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribera' per nagore_lain2001; 'can' (dog) per hualde2005.

sentence: Feito y güeit fan una ueitena.
ipa: fejto ʝ ɡweit fan una weitena
gloss_en: Done, and eight make a set of eight.
notes: F- retained 'feito' and -CT- > -it- 'feito','güeit' — kept even in the Castilian-leaning west per nagore_lain2001; numeral 'güeit' per penny2002.

sentence: A finestra d'a montaña ye ubierta.
ipa: a finestɾa ð a montaɲa ʝe uβjeɾta
gloss_en: The mountain window is open.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'montaña' and Ŏ>ie 'ubierta' per nagore_lain2001; 'finestra' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per hualde2005.

sentence: Plebe muito sobre os campos berdes.
ipa: pleβe mwito sobɾe os kampos beɾdes
gloss_en: It rains a lot over the green fields.
notes: 'plebe' (rains), 'muito' (< MULTU) per nagore_lain2001; plural article 'os' per hualde2005.

sentence: No creigo que nieve sobre aquel tozal.
ipa: no kɾejɣo ke njeβe sobɾe akel toθal
gloss_en: I do not think it will snow over that hill.
notes: Ĕ>ie 'nieve' and 'creigo','tozal' (hill) per nagore_lain2001; negation frame per penny2002.
